subscription.title: Subscription & Quotas
subscription.subtitle: Manage your current plan, increase your quotas, or view past payments.

subscription.historyEmptyDesc: When your first subscription upgrade or credit package purchase is completed, billing and transaction records will be listed here.

free.name: Discovery
free.description: An entry tier for users who want to explore the platform, see sample outputs, and test their first workflow.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: A low-barrier professional plan for solo architects and interior designers, bridging Discovery and Pro.

features.4: Standard setup guide and onboarding videos

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: The main production plan for busy professionals and small teams, with collaboration for up to 5 people.

features.4: 20% subscriber discount on VR and production services

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: A team plan for design studios managing multiple collaborators, shared pools, and client presentation workflows.

features.4: Full-day AI & VR setup and team training
features.5: Dedicated project manager and priority support
features.6: Add-on-ready infrastructure for white-label and API modules

boost-500.label: Flow Boost
boost-500.description: A quick top-up for mid-month deliveries that need extra capacity.

boost-1500.label: Project Speed
boost-1500.description: A balanced extra quota for teams with proposal, tender, and presentation peaks.

boost-4000.label: Tender Sprint
boost-4000.description: A one-time high-volume package for major submissions and competition periods.

pricingExplanation.unitDescription: 1 transaction is a single AI task or advanced transformation right. For example, one render enhancement, plan coloring, style transfer, or scene revision consumes one transaction.
pricingExplanation.annualNote: Annual upfront payment includes approximately a 20% price advantage.
pricingExplanation.addOnNote: Extra transaction packages do not replace the monthly plan; they are premium top-up tiers for busy periods.
pricingExplanation.studioNote: The Studio pool is not divided per person; the team shares it together, so high-usage teammates do not block the project.

analysis.label: Architectural Report
analysis.desc: Analyzes the image through a professional architect's perspective.

img2img.label: Style Transfer
img2img.desc: Transforms the architectural image into the selected style.

enhance.label: Render Enhancement
enhance.desc: Improves raw or low-quality render images.

sceneedit.label: Scene Editing
sceneedit.desc: Edits objects with references while preserving the main scene.

plancolor.label: Plan Coloring
plancolor.desc: Colors the floor plan according to the selected style.

modern-minimal-kitchen.name: Modern minimal kitchen
modern-minimal-kitchen.prompt: A modern and minimalist kitchen design. Glossy white surfaces, hidden handles, integrated appliances, and natural light. Light oak laminate flooring and quartz countertops. Simple, spacious, and functional.

scandinavian-living.name: Scandinavian-style living room
scandinavian-living.prompt: A warm and inviting Scandinavian-style living room. Light colors, natural wood, comfortable sofas, plenty of plants, and soft textiles. Hygge concept, functional furniture, and pastel tones.

brutalist-facade.name: Brutalist facade design
brutalist-facade.prompt: A building facade in brutalist architectural style. Raw concrete, geometric forms, large-scale windows, and industrial materials. Textured surfaces, sharp lines, and a monolithic appearance.

rustic-country-house.name: Rustic country house
rustic-country-house.prompt: A rustic country house enriched with stone and wood details. Fireplace, barn doors, flower garden, and natural materials. Warm colors, handmade textures, and a nostalgic atmosphere.

industrial-loft.name: Industrial loft
industrial-loft.prompt: A high-ceilinged, open-plan industrial loft. Old factory windows, metal stairs, concrete floors, and vintage furniture. Raw materials, Edison bulbs, and artistic touches.

japanese-zen-garden.name: Japanese zen garden
japanese-zen-garden.prompt: A Japanese garden based on Zen philosophy. Rock compositions, sand patterns, bamboo, water features, and minimalist planting. Serenity, balance, and harmony with nature.

art-deco-hotel.name: Art Deco hotel lobby
art-deco-hotel.prompt: A luxurious hotel lobby in 1920s Art Deco style. Geometric patterns, gold details, marble flooring, crystal chandeliers, and velvet fabrics. Elegance, comfort, and grandeur.

sustainable-green-building.name: Sustainable green building
sustainable-green-building.prompt: An eco-friendly sustainable green building. Vertical gardens, solar panels, rainwater harvesting, natural ventilation, and recycled materials. Biophilic design and energy efficiency.

projects.selectFileRequired: Please select at least one file.
projects.moveToTrashDescription: {projectName} will be moved to trash. You can restore it within 30 days.
projects.bulkDeleteDescription: The selected {count} projects will be moved to trash. You can restore them within 30 days.
